tools.name: projects.fileProjectsLocationsBackupsList
tools.description: Lists all backups in a project for either a specified location or for all locations.

tools.name: projects.fileProjectsLocationsInstancesCreate
tools.description: Creates an instance. When creating from a backup, the capacity of the new instance needs to be equal to or larger than the capacity of the backup (and also equal to or larger than the minimum capacity of the tier).

tools.name: projects.fileProjectsLocationsInstancesList
tools.description: Lists all instances in a project for either a specified location or for all locations.

tools.name: projects.fileProjectsLocationsInstancesRestore
tools.description: Restores an existing instance's file share from a backup. The capacity of the instance needs to be equal to or larger than the capacity of the backup (and also equal to or larger than the minimum capacity of the tier).

tools.name: projects.fileProjectsLocationsInstancesRevert
tools.description: Revert an existing instance's file system to a specified snapshot.

tools.name: projects.fileProjectsLocationsInstancesSnapshotsList
tools.description: Lists all snapshots in a project for either a specified location or for all locations.

tools.name: projects.fileProjectsLocationsInstancesSnapshotsPatch
tools.description: Updates the settings of a specific snapshot.

tools.name: projects.fileProjectsLocationsList
tools.description: Lists information about the supported locations for this service.

tools.name: projects.fileProjectsLocationsOperationsCancel
tools.description: Starts asynchronous cancellation on a long-running operation. The server makes a best effort to cancel the operation, but success is not guaranteed. If the server doesn't support this method, it returns `google.rpc.Code.UNIMPLEMENTED`. Clients can use Operations.GetOperation or other methods to check whether the cancellation succeeded or whether the operation completed despite cancellation. On successful cancellation, the operation is not deleted; instead, it becomes an operation with an Operation.error value with a google.rpc.Status.code of 1, corresponding to `Code.CANCELLED`.

tools.name: projects.fileProjectsLocationsOperationsDelete
tools.description: Deletes a long-running operation. This method indicates that the client is no longer interested in the operation result. It does not cancel the operation. If the server doesn't support this method, it returns `google.rpc.Code.UNIMPLEMENTED`.

tools.name: projects.fileProjectsLocationsOperationsGet
tools.description: Gets the latest state of a long-running operation. Clients can use this method to poll the operation result at intervals as recommended by the API service.

tools.name: projects.fileProjectsLocationsOperationsList
tools.description: Lists operations that match the specified filter in the request. If the server doesn't support this method, it returns `UNIMPLEMENTED`.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
